title: 勉強はマヤにおまかせ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for our meeting, but Mayano Top Gun
still hasn't shown up...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo! Did I keep you waiting, Trainer?
choice_data_list: No, I just got here too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nice! ☆ Is it just me, or does this feel like a date?!
Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! I should say sorry first! I got caught up
with some classmates...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Tomorrow's test day...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I'm sooo depressed. Maybe I should just skip...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Right?! Tests totally suck!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Even if you finish early, you can't take a nap or
play with anyone! All you can do is doodle!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Maya...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I'm so jealous. You're gonna breeze through the
next test too, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehe, maybe!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I got it! Maya, tell us how to pass the next test!
Teach us your ways!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It'd be a huge help! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆ Leave it to me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So I helped them as much as I could—which made
them really happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
They even asked me to help them again next
time! Ehehe... It's tough being popular! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun might be in good spirits, but as
her trainer, I can't help but worry that this may
end up being a burden on her.
choice_data_list: Are they going to give you anything as thanks?
Make sure to say no if you aren't in the mood.
Make sure to say no if you aren't in the mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun might be in good spirits, but as
her trainer, I can't help but worry that this may
end up being a burden on her.
choice_data_list: Are they going to give you anything as thanks?
Make sure to say no if you aren't in the mood.
Make sure to say no if you aren't in the mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if she were to get something out of it, it'd
be a little easier on her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! That totally slipped my mind!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
A thank you gift, huh? ♪ What do you think I
should ask for?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I got it! I'll make them promise to play with me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Since it's test season, everyone's been so busy
studying that we haven't played together at all.
choice_data_list: I'm sure they have lots of time now.
I'm sure they have lots of time now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Definitely! I'll ask them to hang out tomorrow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: A thank you gift?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! I want you to come play with me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I've been feeling kinda lonely lately since
everyone's been so busy with exams.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I've heard rumors of Maya's famous boot camp...
You want us to play till we drop, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Let's do it. I could use a break!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Me too! I'd take on the boot camp any day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Let's play our hearts out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Mayano Top Gun returns home
full of energy after having hung out with her
friends right up until curfew.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Come on! You're such a worrier, you know! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm more than happy to help, and I'm glad that my
friends are learning!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Everything's great! ♪
choice_data_list: How about you make me happy next?
How about you make me happy next?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay! Your wish is my command! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a promise made, I set Mayano Top Gun to
work in some intense training.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Waaah! This doesn't make me happy at all!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urgh... You're so mean, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Keep up the good work, Maya!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer's pretty skilled too, knowing how to
handle you like that!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Totally! My trainer is super cool! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You know... you might want to pick an attitude.
Pouty or happy, which is it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! The heart of a young maiden is
complicated, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mayano Top Gun has become a bit wiser
after this experience.
